resources.string: Select what Ad issues you met:
The song has been hidden, add to song list and play?
You only allow Lark Video to limited access. Allow all to play more videos.
You only allow Lark Video to limited access. Allow all to play new videos.
Grant access to media files to play your own videos or music.
Starting download, it will be installed when you return to the app
Folder hidden, you can recover it from Hide settings
Fail to start system playback instance, please reboot the app or phone to solve
Go to \"Settings\" and enable the \"Allow All Videos\" option to play all videos
You have authorized this folder before
Add more videos from the folder
Click to add %s Audio to list
Skip online music automatically when you are not connected to Wi-Fi
%1$s and %2$s removed from list because file not exist.
SD card not found, %1$s and %2$s removed from list.
The folder you selected is not available
Click on %s to continue using Lark Video
Click on the button to continue
"You'll no longer receive music push for you, are you sure to close?"
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Are your sure to clear search history？
Permanently delete following album and %s files in the album too?
Permanently delete following artist and %s files in the artist too?
Are you sure you want to clear all search history?
Turn on Power Saving Mode to continue playing.
"We don't support online playback, you can download it and listen offline"
子线程：异常被拦截,待处理
主线程：异常被拦截,待处理
Please install or upgrade Android System WebView in Google Play Store.
It can be recovered on the scan page, unless you delete the song from your phone by checking the box below
Please note that once deleted, your information/data will no longer be available on this device or Lark Video Player, so please proceed with caution.
You must fill in the details before submitting.
Do you want to watch this video on YouTube?
Grant the necessary permissions to prevent background play from being interrupted
"We've received your feedback! We suggest granting permission to prevent music playback from being interrupted in the background."
Your edits will not be saved.
You might need to manually grant the Draw over other apps permission for Lark Video in Settings -> Apps -> Draw over other apps
Only in this way will you be notified on processing progress.
This is already in your playlist
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
"Grant permission to play more videos and use subtitle features! 1.Go to Settings 2.Click \"Permissions\" 3.Click [Photos and videos] and allow all videos"
Failed, please check your network and try again.
Allow permission to use the subtitle feature.
You have edited the feedback, click to discard this feedback.
"It doesn't have the information I need."
The information was hard to follow or confusing.
The solution did not work as described.
There is a broken link, missing image, or typo.
Please describe your problem using at least 10 characters so that we can better troubleshoot it
Failed to submit your feedback, please try again
Uploading to Lark Video, please wait
Your feedback was sent too frequently, please try again later
If you have any problems, or suggestions, please feedback to us.
Thanks for your feedback! You will get a notice once we reply to it. 😉
By tapping \"Submit\", you agree %1$s and %2$s of our customer service provider to provide and improve problem solving solutions via sharing your personal data.
Sending feedback to Lark Video, please wait
Failed to upload the file, please try again
Something is wrong with the storage, refresh the list to retry.
Find more audios by folders and filters
Only songs in selected folders will appear in your library.
Lark Video - Free video player & Mp4 player
Please grant Lark Video access to media and files, so that it can play songs and videos for you.
"1. Go settings 2. Click \"%1$s\" 3. Click [%2$s] and allow it!"
"1. Go settings 2. Click \"Permissions\" 3. Click [Photos and videos] and allow all videos!"
Grant permission to use the private folder
Grant permission to play more videos and use subtitle features!
Allow the permission to play videos
Choose \"Allow all\" to play your videos with Lark Video Player and enjoy the features such as subtitles
"Don't have permissions to play this file. Please allow storage access of this folder to play."
Do you want to turn on push notification to get special music recommendation for you?
Turn on the notification permission to control music in the notification bar.
Please allow to read storage in permissions management to start your music journey
Please allow to read storage in permissions management to start your video journey
Allow storage permissions to check the following records
Upload files to help us solve the problem
You can tap \"Like\" to add songs to your Library.
Partial access granted. Only manually selected videos are shown. Grant full access to auto-discover all videos.
Only manually selected videos are shown.
As required by the rights owner this song is unavailable for downloading currently.
As required by the rights owner this song is unavailable for playing currently.
needs to use your location data
Locked 1 video, failed to lock 1 video
Locked 1 video, failed to lock %d videos
Locked %d videos, failed to lock 1 video
Locked %1$d videos, failed to lock %2$d videos
Running less apps to keep music playing
Choose the permission below to play your videos.
To play more videos, manage permissions
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
"Don't have any hidden songs yet, you can hide unwanted audio in song list."
Allow permission to play more videos.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Please check your network connection and try again
Turn on notifications to get updates on new content
Add %s new themes, come and try~
Allow permission to play new videos.
There is no folder with audio in your phone
No network, online matching is cancelled
No permission to search local videos
Continuing this song will cost your data stream as you are using mobile network now
"YouTube doesn't allow playing online music on locked screen. Lark Video will automatically skip the online music when you lock phone screen. Please activate Power Saving Mode."
There are online music in the playlist
"YouTube doesn't allow playing online music when screen is locked, please activate Power Saving Mode"
You can check the videos in settings
Unable to connect to Google Play Store.
You are premium already, no need to subscribe again.
"Step1: Select a folder to scan audio files Step2: Click the button below"
"Step1: Select a folder to scan video files Step2: Click the button below"
Grant the permission to play on Lark Video or delete the video.
The permission was lost, allow the permission to play the videos.
Allow notifications for quick video control from the notification panel.
Allow notifications for quick video control
Please give Lark Video \"Display pop-up window\" permission, or the playback may be interrupted sometimes
"Lark Video needs the \"Allow all\" permission to auto-discover and play your device's videos."
"Video playback isn't possible without access. Please select Allow all for full access."
Allow all is required to play your videos well
Turn on notifications to play your videos as audio in the notification bar
Play more videos on Lark Video
No network connection, start to play offline music.
Turn on notifications to control songs from the notification bar
File is invalid or broken. Please confirm file correctness and retry.
Failed to play. The file is corrupted.
Fail to play media. Please check file %s.
Failed to play. An unexpected error occurred.
Fail to play the content, please restart this app and retry
Failed to play. Unable to decode the file.
File not exists. Please check location: %s.
"Failed to play. The file doesn't exist."
Fail to obtain media info. Please confirm the correctness of %s.
Failed to play. Unsupported file format.
"Don't have permissions to play this file. Please check file location: %s."
Failed to play. No permission to read the file.
Fail to read file %s, please try again later.
Failed to play. Unable to read the file.
File format %s is not supported for now.
File format %s is not supported for now.
The music play was interrupted by other apps.
Allow Lark Video to play together with other apps?
Swipe up and down to adjust brightness
Swipe left and right to adjust video progress
Swipe up and down to adjust volume
❤️ Your favorite playlist \"%s\" has been updated, come and listen~
By tapping Allow, you agree to our %s and %s.
By tapping Start, you agree to our %s and %s.

Subscription will give you ad-free access to Lark Video.Payment is charged through Google Play Store at confirmation of purchase. Subscription is billed monthly at %s or yearly at %s, and auto-renews before the end of the current period, unless canceled 24-hours in advance. No refunds for partial subscription periods. %s apply.
"Please add your email address (or tracking number), because we have cancelled the VIP service. If you have already made a refund, please ignore this information, thank you! Email(tracking number):"
Dear users, if you need Vip refund, please click on the details. Thank you for your cooperation!
Set Security email to recover the password if needed
Your password will not be saved
%s removed from list because file not exist.
SD card not found, %s removed from list.
"Grant permission to play more videos and use subtitle features! 1.Click on \"Allow\" 2.Choose \"Allow all\""
You only allow Lark Video to limited access, allow all to play more videos
"Are you sure to recover the song's information to what it was before online matching?"
The permission was lost, allow the permission to continue playing the video?
Oops, due to YouTube terms, Lark Video cannot play online music when screen locked. Please turn on our Power Saving Mode to continue playing.
No results of your music & video
All videos in the group will be selected.
Add more videos from the album
Oops… Server is taking a nap. Retry to wake it up!
LarkPlayer is overloaded at the moment, please wait a minute and try again
In case you forget your password
To access music, select Allow in settings
To access media, select Allow in settings
To access videos, select Always allow all in settings
"1. Click Option [Permissions] 2. Click [Photos and videos] 3. Choose [Always allow all]"
"1. Click Option [%s] 2. Click [%s] and allow it!"
No permission to share this file and folder.
%1$s does not support sharing files larger than %2$sM.
Up to %d files can be shared.
You can now share music faster & easier
Swipe up to view the next video
Links are provided only for the convenience of users to browse external websites, and we do not make any profit from them. If copyright infringement is found, the links will be promptly removed.
Slide up again to go beyond 100%
SSL authentication failed, continue to search on Lark Video?
Please search Lark Video and turn it off
Please set the battery mode of LarkVideo to Unrestricted
Grant permission to ensure background play
Hide audios that duration less than %d seconds
Hide audios that size less than %d kb
The subtitle file is not available
Enjoy music with an Ad-Free experience!
Subtitles are sourced from third-party websites.
The audios that size less than %dkb
Quit customizing？Your customize theme will not be saved.
YouTube does not allow to play music in background.
Please adjust the volume to play
No videos or songs have been deleted in the past 30 days.
Files will be permanently deleted 30 days after being moved to Recently Deleted.
Allow permission to use Recently deleted
Failed to turn on, try again please
Unable to play audio on this page
Unable to play video on this page
If access is denied, Lark Video cannot auto-discover videos. Manually select files to play, with limited browsing.
Click to unlock all downloaded music
Unlocked 1 video, failed to unlock 1 video
Unlocked 1 video, failed to unlock %d videos
Unlocked %d videos, failed to unlock 1 video
Unlocked %1$d videos, failed to unlock %2$d videos
"Password confirmed! Use fingerprint to quick unlock?"
Reset your password via security email
Folder hided, you can recover it from Video files settings
Only videos in selected folders will appear in your library.
Volume adjustment is not supported in Do Not Disturb mode.
Something went wrong, please try again
